description: Can create and manage all aspects of app registrations and enterprise apps.
Can manage all aspects of the Intune product.
Can manage all aspects of the SharePoint service.
Can manage all aspects of Microsoft Entra ID and Microsoft services that use Microsoft Entra identities.
Users assigned to this role are added to the local administrators group on Microsoft Entra joined devices.
displayName: Azure AD Joined Device Local Administrator

description: Can read basic directory information. Commonly used to grant directory read access to applications and guests.

oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: To allow application to send notifications to Azure AD provisioning service
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: To allow application to send notifications to Azure AD provisioning service
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Send notifications to Azure AD provisioning service
